List.Title: Appointing Departments and Schools
List.Description: A list of standarized, top-level departments, colleges, and schools, used for reporting and filtering purposes. The values in this list are used throughout TrackMaster, in particular the People list, as drop-down menu options.
List.Name: {3CCEC0F2-98C3-401F-8DD7-B62DE98361D8}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: The standardized name of this appointing department. Typically, this is a top-level department (one level below a school or college), without prefixes or abbreviations. This value is not always the official department name in the system, but rather a shorter, manually-entered name used for reporting purposes.

Field.Name: field_1
Field.Description: The University of Michigan school, college, or appointing institute to which this department belongs. Currently, only two specific institutes have the same full faculty appointing power as colleges and institutes.

Field.Name: field_2
Field.Description: The university campus for this school or college.
Auto-calculated, concatenated column to show in other lists. Do not update manually.
Field.Name: DisplayTitle

Field.Description: Department prefixes from MCommunity, separated by commas. This helps automate the mapping from MCommunity department names to TrackMaster's standardized appointing department names.
Field.Name: Prefixes
Field.Title: Prefixes

List.Title: Appointing Schools
List.Description: Listing of schools, colleges and institutes that have faculty appointing power.
List.Name: {623F0C1F-C0DB-4C77-9CC6-412DE9088121}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: The official name of this school, college or institute.

Field.Description: The university campus for this appointing school, college or institute.
Field.Name: Campus
Field.Title: Campus

Field.Description: The official website for this school, college or institute.
Field.Name: Website
Field.Title: Website

Field.Name: TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Additional notes, comments or remarks.
Field.Name: Notes
Field.Title: Notes

Field.Description: Auto-calculated. The name of the school, concatenated with the campus, to make it easier to pick a unique school in drop-downs in other lists.
Field.Name: DisplayName

List.Title: Apps for SharePoint
List.Description: A catalog to store apps for SharePoint
List.Name: {A6CCD761-B6C8-465B-B739-95CCBFA739B9}

Field.Name: CheckedOutUserId
Field.DisplayName: ID of the User who has the item Checked Out

Field.Name: LinkCheckedOutTitle
Field.AuthoringInfo: (link to username to user details page)

Field.Name: AppThumbnailURL
Field.Description: The URL to the app icon. The icon should have a width and height of 96 pixels.

Field.Name: AppVideoURL
Field.Description: A URL to a video file or web page with an embedded video

Field.Name: IsAppPackageEnabled
Field.Description: End users should see this app as an option to add to sites.

Field.Name: IsFeaturedApp
Field.Description: This app should appear in the "noteworthy" section.

Field.Name: AppImageURL1
Field.Description: An image or screenshot for this app. Images should have a width of 512 pixels and a height of 384 pixels.

Field.Name: AppImageURL2
Field.Description: An image or screenshot for this app. Images should have a width of 512 pixels and a height of 384 pixels.

Field.Name: AppImageURL3
Field.Description: An image or screenshot for this app. Images should have a width of 512 pixels and a height of 384 pixels.

Field.Name: AppImageURL4
Field.Description: An image or screenshot for this app. Images should have a width of 512 pixels and a height of 384 pixels.

Field.Name: AppImageURL5
Field.Description: An image or screenshot for this app. Images should have a width of 512 pixels and a height of 384 pixels.

List.Title: Automation Files
List.Description: Backend document library used by Power Automate and iPaaS. It includes temporary files used for syncing MCommunity group membership, and copies of all files submitted by end users via automation requests.
List.Name: {691FBC2D-5A19-4F70-A5FA-E0CD3091629B}

List.Title: Automation Requests
List.Description: Backend for bulk uploads and automated tasks. This list is used to trigger, track, and notify users of different automations. For system use only. Important: Do not add items to this list directly. Doing so may break things and corrupt data. Only use via the Bulk Uploads and Automations section.
List.Name: {195639D2-F676-4AF3-904C-023C9F39E43E}

Field.Description: If a contact is not already in the People list, it will be created automatically using this contact type as needed.
Field.Name: ContactType
Field.Title: Contact Type

Field.Name: Template
Field.Title: Template
Field.Description: Paste your document or email here to use as a template. Available fields: [FIRSTNAME], [LASTNAME], [FULLNAME], [PI], [CENTERNAME].

Field.Name: SubmissionForm
Field.Description: The custom form that was submitted. This field is based on Confirmation checkboxes, and is used to determine what flow to run.

Field.Name: ConfirmPeopleUpload
Field.Title: ConfirmPeopleUpload
Field.Description: Checkbox used to identify that a specific automation is being selected, without actually selecting it from the drop-down. This is needed for automations that are linked to from within the navigation menu.

Field.Name: ConfirmPIAssignment
Field.Title: ConfirmPIAssignment
Field.Description: Checkbox used to identify that a specific automation is being selected, without actually selecting it from the drop-down. This is needed for automations that are linked to from within the navigation menu.

Field.Name: ConfirmEventAttendanceUpload
Field.Title: ConfirmEventAttendanceUpload
Field.Description: Checkbox used to identify that a specific automation is being selected, without actually selecting it from the drop-down. This is needed for automations that are linked to from within the navigation menu.

Field.Name: ConfirmEventRegistrationUpload
Field.Title: ConfirmEventRegistrationUpload
Field.Description: Checkbox used to identify that a specific automation is being selected, without actually selecting it from the drop-down. This is needed for automations that are linked to from within the navigation menu.
The name of the flow used.

List.Title: Automations List
List.Description: List of automations in Power Automate and TDX iPaaS. This list is updated automatically every night. Field.Name: Provided_x0020_By_x003a__hiddenT
Field.Description: Automatic lookup that pulls a list of MS365-linked email addresses for team members of the selected field. This is used by Power Automate to update another hidden field, which in turn is used by other lists for custom views.
System column used for propagating team members from the Teams List, to facilitate view filters based on the person who is viewing the list.
Field.Name: hiddenTeamMemberEmails

List.Title: Consultations
List.Description: Tracks consultations provided to others, whether by email, meetings, or calls. This facilitates reporting on reach and impact.
List.Name: {46C5DE12-F5B3-4BB8-9FAD-E75C6B0190A9}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: (Optional) A quick one-line summary of how the member or customer engaged with us. If left empty, this field is auto-populated with the service type and recipients after saving. This field is only used for making search results more readable.
The attendees or recipients of this consultation. If the PI also attended, enter them here as well.
Field.Name: Recipient

Field.Description: The Primary Investigator or Co-Investigators of the study or project. Investigators do not need to be present at the time of service.
Field.Name: PI
Field.Title: Project PI or Contact

Field.Description: The date when either: a service was provided; a consultation meeting was held; email was received; or long-running activity started.
Field.Name: Date
Field.Title: Consultation Date

Field.Description: If a follow up is required, this date is a reminder of when to follow up. An email reminder will be sent to the corresponding team on this date.

Field.Description: The fiscal year when this service was provided (7/1 - 6/30).
Field.Name: FiscalYear
Field.FormulaDisplayNames: =TEXT(IF(AND(MONTH([Consultation Date])>=1,MONTH([Consultation Date])<=6),YEAR([Consultation Date])-1,YEAR([Consultation Date])),"0000")&"-"&TEXT(IF(AND(MONTH([Consultation Date])>=7,MONTH([Consultation Date])<=12),YEAR([Consultation Date])+1,YEAR([Consultation Date])),"0000")

Field.Name: TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.

Field.Name: EmailRecipientsPeople_x003a_Uniq
Field.Description: Email recipients, linked to People list (UniqName).

Field.Name: EmailRecipientsPeople_x003a__hid
Field.Description: School affiliations for the email recipients that are linked to the People list.
If checked, TrackMaster will copy these tags to the People list record for each email recipient. The tag sync process can take a few hours, and it will uncheck this box once complete.
Field.Name: TagsSync

Field.Description: System field used by automations to keep track of the last version that was modified automatically. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Field.Name: _SysVersion

Field.Description: System field used by automations to keep track of the last workflow that modified this item. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Field.Name: _SysFlow

Field.Description: If this email was sent to a group, enter the group here, so the recipients can be extracted from that group. The group must already be configured in the Groups List.
Field.Name: GroupRecipients
GroupRecipients_x003a_MCommunity
Field.Description: List of MCommunity groups to whom the email was sent. Auto-populated based on the Recipient Groups field.
The display name used to refer back to this email from other lists. Auto-calculated.
Field.Name: EmailDisplayName

List.Title: Event Summary
List.Description: Tracks events hosted by the center. Includes public details such as a summary, description, and event recording link, as well as private information for reporting purposes such as number of registrants and attendees.
List.Name: {3E5499E4-76C7-46BF-9F29-A4E159DAC9CA}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: (Required) The title of the event. This value must be unique. For repeating events, use the title of the event series followed by the date to make this value unique.

Field.Name: EventDate
Field.Title: Event Date
Field.Description: The date when the event occurred.
The overall or average rating (0-5) for the event provided by the attendees.
Field.Name: OverallRating

Field.Description: List of people who pre-registered for the event, excluding walk-ins.
Field.Name: Registrants
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex","flex-direction":"column","align-items":"flex-start","padding":"11px 0","min-height":"0"},"inlineEditField":"@currentField","children":[{"forEach":"itemIterator in @currentField","elmType":"div","txtContent":"=if(length(@currentField)>9 && loopIndex('itemIterator')==9, '+ ' + toString(length(@currentField)-9) + ' more.', [$itemIterator.lookupValue])","style":{"padding-bottom":"1px","display":"=if(length(@currentField)>9 && loopIndex('itemIterator')>=10, 'none', 'inline-block')"}}]}

Field.Description: List of even attendees, if available.
Field.Name: Attendees0
Field.Title: Attendees
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex","flex-direction":"column","align-items":"flex-start","padding":"11px 0","min-height":"0"},"inlineEditField":"@currentField","children":[{"forEach":"itemIterator in @currentField","elmType":"div","txtContent":"=if(length(@currentField)>9 && loopIndex('itemIterator')==9, '+ ' + toString(length(@currentField)-9) + ' more.', [$itemIterator.lookupValue])","style":{"padding-bottom":"1px","display":"=if(length(@currentField)>9 && loopIndex('itemIterator')>=10, 'none', 'inline-block')"}}]}

Field.Description: If checked, the # of registrants and # of attendees will be auto-calculated using their corresponding columns. If unchecked, you can specify a value manually and it will not get overridden.
Field.Name: AutoCalculateCounts

Field.Description: The approximate number of pre-registered participants, excluding walk-ins.
Field.Name: RegistrantsCount

Field.Description: The approximate number of attendees, including walk-ins, guests, and those joining by phone.
Field.Name: AttendeesCount

Field.Description: List of presenters / speakers.
Field.Name: Speakers
Vendors
Field.Description: List of vendors used in this event. Must exist in the People list first.

Field.Name: EventLocation
Field.Description: The physical location of the event, if applicable.
The URL to the webpage or announcement for the event.
Field.Name: Webpage

Field.Description: Link to the shared folder or shared drive where event files are stored (e.g. agenda, program, slides, etc.)
Field.Name: SharedFolder

Field.Description: Link to video recording (or playlist), if available. For individual videos, use the video's "Share" button to get the link. For playlists, right-click "Play All" and copy the link.

List.Title: Groups List
List.Description: Configuration for groups of people, MCommunity sync settings, and definitions of "communities" (larger collection of people, typically those served by a specific team or core). Groups with tye "Sync" box checked, and marke as "Active", have their members automatically synced from MCommunity. Note that a center membership group is required for TrackMaster to function properly. Its name and internal ID must be entered into Power Automate environment variables.
List.Name: {CE40C203-443B-415E-8EF7-42E60E264763}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: The name or title of this group. This value is used in drop-downs in other lists. It does not necessarily have to be the same as the group name in MCommunity, MS Teams or Office 365.

Field.Name: Description
Field.Description: A short description of this group and its purpose.
Primary team member who leads or facilitates this group.
Field.Name: Group_x0020_Leader

Field.Description: Link to view all members of this group in the People list.
Field.Name: GroupMembers
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"text-align":"center","vertical-align":"middle","display":"=if(@currentField=='','none','inheirt')"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","style":{"text-align":"center","vertical-align":"middle"},"attributes":{"href":"@currentField","target":"_top","title":"=if(@currentField=='', ' (not set) ', 'Click to open')","class":"ms-fontSize-18"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(@currentField=='', 'none', 'People')"},"style":{"text-align":"center","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","padding-left":"2px","padding-right":"3px","class":"ms-fontSize-18"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=if(@currentField=='', '', 'View Members')","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontSize-12"},"style":{"padding-left":"3px","padding-right":"2px","vertical-align":"middle"}}]}]}

Field.Name: MCommunity_x0020_Group
Field.Description: Enter the email address of the corresponding MCommunity group to sync its members with the People list.

Validation.Message: The MCommunity Group must be a valid email address for the group.

Field.ValidationDisplayNames: =IF(LEN([MCommunity Group])<=0,TRUE,AND(ISERROR(FIND(" ",[MCommunity Group],1)),IF(ISERROR(FIND("@",[MCommunity Group],2)),FALSE,AND(ISERROR(FIND("@",#NAME?,FIND("@",[MCommunity Group],2)+1)),IF(ISERROR(FIND(".",[MCommunity Group],FIND("@",[MCommunity Group],2)+2)),FALSE,FIND(".",[MCommunity Group],FIND("@",[MCommunity Group],2)+2)<LEN([MCommunity Group]))))))

Field.Description: The shared drive used by this group, if applicable.

Field.Name: Group_x0020_WebPage
Field.Description: The web page for this group, if applicable.

Field.Name: Honorific
Field.Title: Honorific

Field.Name: FirstName
Field.Title: First Name
Field.Description: First name(s) (surname). If not entered manually, the system will extract this value from the Full Name field or from MCommunity.

Field.Name: LastName
Field.Title: Last Name
Field.Description: Last name(s) (family or given name). If not entered manually, the system will extract this value from the Full Name field or from MCommunity.
Professional credentials (e.g. M.D., Ph.D.), separated by commas.
Field.Name: Credentials
JobTitle
Field.Title: Job Title
Field.Description: The person's current job title. For internal contacts, this is set automatically from MCommunity whenever possible.

Field.Name: Department
Field.Description: Primary department. For internal contacts, this value is updated automatically from MCommunity.

Field.Description: For members and prospective members, the condensed job title to use for reporting purposes.

Field.Name: Department0
Field.Description: Appointing or primary department, used for center-wide reporting.

Field.Description: Company or organization. For P2P, this is typically the school district.

Field.Description: Mobile phone number.

Email address, which defaults to the user's U-M level 1 email (@umich.edu) unless overridden by the Preferred Email field.

Field.Name: Country_x002f_Region

Field.Description: Country or region.

Field.Name: Website
Field.Title: Website
Field.Description: Link to this person's professional website or lab website. For members, this value is typically displayed in member profile pages.
External profile page. For members, use the profile page from the appointing department.

Field.Description: Bluesky profile handle or URL.

Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","display":"flex","min-width":"180px","padding":"0 2px","margin-left":"2px","margin-right":"4px","text-overflow":"ellipsis","justify-content":"space-between","clear":"both","max-height":"44px"},"attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"},"attributes":{"href":"=if([$MREID]=='', 'https://experts.umich.edu/search?by=text&type=user&v=' + [$Title], if(startsWith([$MREID],'https:') || startsWith([$MREID],'http:') || indexOf([$MREID],'/')>0, [$MREID], 'https://experts.umich.edu/' + [$MREID]) )","target":"_blank","title":"=if([$MREID]=='','Michigan Experts Profile not set. Click to search by name.', 'Visit Michigan Experts Profile.')","class":"ms-fontSize-12 ms-fontColor-themePrimary ms-fontColor-themeDark--hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(@currentField=='', 'NewsSearch', 'Education')","class":"sp-field-quickAction ms-fontSize-16"},"style":{"text-align":"left","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","padding-left":"2px","padding-right":"3px"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=if([$MREID]=='', 'Search by name', if(indexOf([$MREID],'/')>0, substring([$MREID], lastIndexOf([$MREID],'/')+1, 48), [$MREID]) )","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontSize-12"},"style":{"padding-left":"3px","padding-right":"2px","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"}}]}]}

Field.Title: ORCID
Field.Description: Open Researcher and Contributor ID (ORCiD) or URL.

Field.Description: Scopus ID (for researchers).

Field.Description: Short biography, for use in websites, conferences, newsletters and other communications.
Field.Name: Biography
Notes
Field.Title: Notes
Field.Description: Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.
Is this person a member of this Center or Institute?
Field.Name: CenterMember
CenterMembershipJoinDate
Field.Title: Center Membership Join Date
Field.Description: The date when this person became a member. This field is set manually or when a person is added to the membership group.
List of groups in which this user is a member. Groups can be configured in the Groups List.
Field.Name: Group_x0020_Membership
ReferralSource
Field.Title: Referral Source
Field.Description: The person, core, team, vendor or website that referred this person to the center. Typically this would be the first core or team that provided a service to this person.

Field.Name: PrimaryInvestigator
Field.Title: Primary Investigator
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person is a PI.

Field.Name: StudyTeamMember
Field.Title: Study Team Member
Field.Description: Indicates whether this staff member is a study team member. For PIs, say No.
The primary principal investigator that this study team member works under. For PIs, leave this field blank.
Field.Name: PrimaryPI

Field.Description: The primary lab which this study team member reports. Please format as: "LabName (PI FullName)".
Field.Name: PrimaryLab
HasReceivedServices
Field.Title: Has Received Services
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person has ever received services (e.g. consultations, awards, program participation). This value can be set manually, or if empty, it is set automatically based on history.

Field.Name: LastServiceDate
Field.Title: Last Service Date
Field.Description: The date when this person last received a service (e.g. consultation, award, program participation). It can be set manually, or if left blank, it is auto-calculated based on history.

Field.Name: HasAttendedEvents
Field.Title: Has Attended Events
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person has ever attended events hosted by this center. This value can be set manually, or if empty, it is set when an Event Summary is added that includes this person as a registrant, attendee or speaker.

Field.Name: LastEventAttndanceDate
Field.Title: Last Event Attendance Date
Field.Description: The date when this person last attended an event hosted by this center. It can be set manually, or if left blank, it is auto-calculated based on Event Summary entries that include this person as a registrant, attendee or speaker.

Field.Name: PrimaryTeamEngagement
Field.Title: Primary Team Engagement
Field.Description: For team members, this is their primary team. For all other contacts, this is the team that maintains the relationship with this person, if applicable.
The research area focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: ResearchAreas

Field.Description: The research methodology and applications focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: ResearchMethodologies

Field.Description: The population focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: Populations
TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.

Field.Name: Internal_x0020_speaker_x003f_
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person can be or has been considered for a speaking engagement or presentation at a University of Michigan event.

Field.Name: External_x0020_Speaker_x003f_
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person can be or has been considered for a speaking engagement or presentation outside of University of Michigan. For external contacts, it indicates whether they can be or have been speakers at U-M events.

Field.Name: Earned_x0020_Media_x003f_
Field.Description: Indicates whether this person has ever earned media coverage for their professional work.
The type of record in MCommunity, if any.
Field.Name: MCommunityRole

Field.Description: If checked, this person has opted out of receiving communications. The specific channels to which they unsubscribed can be found in the Do Not Contact List.
Field.Name: DoNotContact

Field.Description: The display name for this person, formatted for use in drop-down menus in other lists.
Field.Name: DisplayName

Field.Description: URL to profile picture, either from a file attached to this item or from an allowed domain (dc.org, umich.edu, AWS). When set, this picture takes prescedence over MS Teams and MCommunity profile pictures in certain places, such as the Full Name field (which is formatted to display a picture next to the name).
Field.Name: ProfilePictureURL
Active
Field.Title: Active
Field.Description: Indicates whether this record is active (enabled). Inactive records are hidden by default, and are not used in any automations.

Internal field used for propagating certain key fields to other lists, without requiring multiple lookup columns. Do not update manually. Format: |ID|FullName|UniqName|ContactType|TeamsAccount|PI_ID|PI_Name|LastServiceDate|
Field.Name: _SysProfile

Field.Description: System field used by automations to keep track of the last version that was modified automatically. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Field.Name: _SysVersion

Field.Description: System field used by automations to keep track of the last workflow that modified this item. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Field.Name: _SysFlow
Author
Field.Description: The person or account who created this record (author).

Field.Name: Appointing_x0020_Department_x003
Field.Description: Appointing or primary department, used for center-wide reporting.

Field.Name: Created
Field.Description: The date when this record was created.

Field.Name: Modified
Field.Description: The date when this record was last updated.

Field.Name: Editor
Field.Description: The last person or account who updated this record.

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: Display name for this program cycle, used for search results and for drop-downs in related lists. Do not update manually.

Field.Name: Program

Field.Description: The current status of this program cycle.
Field.Name: Status
Field.Title: Status

Field.Name: ApplicantsCount
Field.Title: # Applicants
Field.Description: Auto-calculated. The total number of complete applications received (based on Application Date). It does not include those expressing interest in the program but who did not submit a full application.

Field.Name: ParticipantsCount
Field.Title: # Participants
Field.Description: Auto-calculated. The total number of participants or award recipients after the vetting process has completed.

Auto-calculated. The total number of complete applications received (based on Application Date). It does not include those expressing interest in the program but who did not submit a full application.
Field.Name: ApplicantsCalculated

Field.Description: Auto-calculated. The total number of participants or award recipients after the vetting process has completed.
Field.Name: ParticipantsCalculated
TotalAwardAmount
Field.Title: TotalAwardAmount
Field.Description: The total amount awarded during this program cycle. The value is calculated in Power Automate by adding the amounts awarded to each participant, and is refreshed on every status change.
Auto-calculated. The total amount awarded during this program cycle, calculated by adding the amounts awarded to each participant.
Field.Name: TotalAwardCalculated

Field.Description: The average amount awarded per participant during this program cycle.
Field.Name: AverageAwardAmount
Field.FormulaDisplayNames: =IF(AND([# Recipients]>0,NOT(ISBLANK([# Recipients])),NOT(ISBLANK([Total Award Amount]))),[Total Award Amount]/[# Recipients],0)

Field.Description: The acceptance rate for this program cycle.
Field.Name: AcceptanceRate

Field.Description: The date when the program cycle starts.
Field.Name: StartDate

Field.Description: The date when the program cycle ends.
Field.Name: EndDate
PreLaunchDate
Field.Title: PreLaunchDate

List.Title: Publications

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: The title of the publication.
(Optional) List of authors (names only) as shown in the article or citation.
Field.Name: AuthorNames

Field.Description: The digital object identifier (DOI) for this publication. Use the URL form (e.g. https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.25669173.v1).
Field.Name: DOI
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","children":[{"elmType":"a","style":{"display":"=if(@currentField=='', 'none', 'inherit')","text-decoration":"none"},"attributes":{"href":"=if(@currentField=='', '', if(startsWith(@currentField,'http'), @currentField, 'https://doi.org/'+replace(replace(@currentField,'dx.doi.org/',''),'doi.org/','')))","target":"_blank","title":"Click to open link","class":"sp-quickActions"},"txtContent":"=if(@currentField=='', '', if(startsWith(@currentField,'http'), @currentField, 'https://doi.org/'+replace(replace(@currentField,'dx.doi.org/',''),'doi.org/','')))"}]}

Field.Description: Link to the PI (first author) in the People list. The system will attempt to find this when it syncs to Michigan Experts.
Field.Name: PI

Field.Description: Link to author(s) in the People list. The system will attempt to find this when it syncs to Michigan Experts, but it can also be entered manually.
Field.Name: Authors

Field.Description: The ID for this Publication in Michigan Experts (Symplectic Elements or Dimensions), if known. The system will try to fill this based on DOI#.
Field.Name: DimensionsID

Field.Description: (Optional) The PubMed ID (PMID) for this publication, if it is available on PubMed. Enter either the ID only (e.g. 12345678), the abstract URL (e.g. https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/12345678).
Field.Name: PubMedID

Field.Description: (Optional) The arxiv.org publication ID, if known. Enter either the ID only (1234.5678v9) or the abstract URL (e.g. https://arxiv.org/abs/1234.5678v9).
Field.Name: ArxivID

Field.Description: Consultations that contributed to this publication.
Field.Name: Consultations

Field.Description: Programs that contributed to this publication.
Field.Name: Programs

Field.Description: Outreach emails or newsletters that featured this publication.
Field.Name: RelatedEmail

Field.Description: Additional notes, remarks, or links.
Field.Name: Notes

Field.Name: Authors_x003a_UniqName
Field.Description: The UniqNames of authors in the People list. The system will attempt to find this when it syncs to Michigan Experts, but it can also be entered manually.

List.Title: Publicity
List.Description: Tracks any promotions and publicity done on behalf of members, such as news articles about a study, or social media posts regarding key findings on a publication.

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: The title of the study, publication, funding, grant, event, innovation or other accomplishment that is being promoted.

Field.Name: Researcher
Field.Description: The primary investigator or co-investigators of the study, publication or project that is being promoted. If there are several co-investigators, create this entry with the one PI first, then right click on this item and run the automation to duplicate it for the other co-investigators.

Field.Name: DateofPromotion
Field.Title: Date of Promotion
Field.Description: The date when this work was first promoted by the center.

Field.Name: PromotionChannel

Field.Description: The channel(s) used for promoting this piece.
If applicable, the program or offering related to this promotion.

Field.Description: The team to whom the referral was made.

Field.Name: Active
Field.Description: Indicates whether this record is active (enabled). Inactive records are hidden by default, and are not used in any automations.

Field.Name: Team_x0020_Leader_x003a_Email
Field.Description: The email address of the primary lead for this team or core. Used for automations.

Contains the M365-linked email addresses (Michigan Medicine emails) of those team members who have a level-2 account. This can be used in other lists to create filters based on the person viewing the list.
